dashboard.title: Your Reels
dashboard.subtitle: Create AI-generated videoclips from your music & photo.
dashboard.welcome: Welcome to DELULUREEL! Your 7-day trial is active. You have 6 credits to use.
dashboard.no_reels_sub: Upload your first photo + track to get started.

upload.title: Create New Reel
upload.subtitle: Upload your photo and track. AI does the rest.
upload.audio_sub: AI will analyze BPM and sync the video
upload.cost_included: 1 clip · Kling AI · included in your plan
upload.auto_sub: Claude AI writes the scene from your audio
upload.custom_sub: You describe the exact scene you want
upload.prompt_hint: Kling AI animates this scene starting from your photo
upload.lipsync_sub: AI animates lip movement to match every beat of the track
upload.upload_note_10: ~2 min · Your plan includes this generation
upload.upload_note_30: ~6 min · Your plan includes this generation
upload.upload_note_full: may take 20–40+ min · Your plan includes this generation
upload.status_analyzing_sub: Detecting BPM, energy peaks, and structure
upload.status_generating_sub: Claude AI is designing your video prompt
upload.status_processing_sub: AI is building your reel frame by frame
upload.status_lipsyncing_sub: AI is animating lip movement to match your track
upload.err_timeout: Request timed out — server may be busy. Please try again.
upload.err_network: Network error — server may have restarted. Please try again in a few seconds.

result.formats_note: Upgrade to Pro to get 9:16, 16:9, and 1:1 exports from the same generation.
result.status_queued_sub: Waiting for an available generation slot
result.status_generating_sub: Claude AI is designing your video
result.status_processing_sub: Kling AI is building your reel (~90s)
result.status_lipsyncing_sub: AI is animating lip movement to match your track

auth.signup_create_sub: Card required. Cancel before Day 7 — you pay nothing.
auth.stripe_note: Next step: add your card via Stripe (secure). You won't be charged until Day 7.
auth.sent_sub: We sent a password reset link to {email}. Check your email and click the link to set a new password.
auth.forgot_sub: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.updated_sub: Your password has been changed. You can now log in with your new password.
auth.reset_sub: Choose a strong password for your account.
